const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3000';export const analyticsService={// Get KPI summary
async getKpiSummary(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/analytics/kpi-summary"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch KPI summary');return response.json();},// Get performance metrics
async getPerformanceMetrics(){let timeRange=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'7d';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/analytics/performance?timeRange=").concat(timeRange),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch performance metrics');return response.json();},// Get trend data
async getTrendData(metric){let period=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'30d';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/analytics/trends?metric=").concat(metric,"&period=").concat(period),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch trend data');return response.json();},// Get custom report
async generateReport(params){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/analytics/report"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify(params)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to generate report');return response.json();}};export const routeOptimizationService={// Get current routes
async getRoutes(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/optimize/routes"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch routes');return response.json();},// Optimize route
async optimizeRoute(vehicleId,stops){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/optimize/route-plan"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify({vehicle_capacity:100,stops})});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to optimize route');return response.json();},// Get route comparison
async compareRoutes(originalRoute,optimizedRoute){return{original:originalRoute,optimized:optimizedRoute,improvement:Math.round((originalRoute.distance-optimizedRoute.distance)/originalRoute.distance*100)};}};export const forecastingService={// Get bin forecast
async getForecast(binId){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/forecast/bin/").concat(binId),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch forecast');return response.json();},// Get all forecasts
async getAllForecasts(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/forecast/all"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch forecasts');return response.json();},// Get trend prediction
async getTrendPrediction(binId){let days=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:7;const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/forecast/trend/").concat(binId,"?days=").concat(days),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch trend prediction');return response.json();}};export const anomalyService={// Get anomalies
async getAnomalies(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/anomalies/list"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch anomalies');return response.json();},// Get anomaly details
async getAnomalyDetails(anomalyId){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/anomalies/").concat(anomalyId),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch anomaly details');return response.json();},// Mark anomaly as reviewed
async markReviewed(anomalyId,notes){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/anomalies/").concat(anomalyId,"/review"),{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify({notes,reviewed_at:new Date()})});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to mark anomaly as reviewed');return response.json();}};export const slaService={// Get SLA policies
async getPolicies(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/sla/policies"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch SLA policies');return response.json();},// Get escalations
async getEscalations(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/sla/escalations/pending"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch escalations');return response.json();},// Get SLA metrics
async getMetrics(){let timeRange=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'30d';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/sla/metrics?timeRange=").concat(timeRange),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch SLA metrics');return response.json();}};export const iotService={// Get all telemetry
async getTelemetry(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/iot/telemetry"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch telemetry');return response.json();},// Get bin telemetry
async getBinTelemetry(binId){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/iot/telemetry/bin/").concat(binId),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch bin telemetry');return response.json();},// Get sensor alerts
async getSensorAlerts(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/iot/alerts"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch sensor alerts');return response.json();},// Subscribe to real-time updates
subscribeToUpdates(callback){const eventSource=new EventSource("".concat(API_BASE,"/iot/telemetry/stream"),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});eventSource.onmessage=event=>{callback(JSON.parse(event.data));};return eventSource;}};export const complaintService={// Get all complaints
async getComplaints(){let status=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:null;const url=status?"".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints?status=").concat(status):"".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints");const response=await fetch(url,{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch complaints');return response.json();},// Get complaint details
async getComplaintDetails(complaintId){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints/").concat(complaintId),{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch complaint details');return response.json();},// Create complaint
async createComplaint(data){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify(data)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to create complaint');return response.json();},// Update complaint status
async updateComplaintStatus(complaintId,status,notes){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints/").concat(complaintId),{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify({status,notes,updated_at:new Date()})});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to update complaint');return response.json();},// Add comment to complaint
async addComment(complaintId,comment){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/complaints/").concat(complaintId,"/comment"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(localStorage.getItem('token'))},body:JSON.stringify({comment,commented_at:new Date()})});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to add comment');return response.json();}};
